title: CreateSendRequest Structure
description: JSON Structure for CreateSendRequest from Uniswap Trading API

sender.description: The wallet address which will be used to send the token.

recipient.description: The wallet address which will receive the token.

token.description: The token which will be sent, specified by its token address. For a list of supported tokens, see the [FAQ](https://api-docs.uniswap.org/guides/faqs).

amount.description: The quantity of tokens denominated in the token's base units. (For example, for an ERC20 token one token is 1x10^18 base units. For one USDC token one token is 1x10^6 base units.) This value must be greater than 0.

chainId.description: The unique ID of the blockchain. For a list of supported chains see the [FAQ](https://api-docs.uniswap.org/guides/faqs).

urgency.description: The urgency impacts the estimated gas price of the transaction. The higher the urgency, the higher the gas price, and the faster the transaction is likely to be selected from the mempool. The default value is `urgent`.
